feed.subtitle: Experimental Research Node – NV0987 Decentralized Knowledge Infrastructure

entry.title: NV0987 Lab – Research Node
entry.summary: Experimental research node exploring relational color systems, AI image generation, decentralized identity, and semantic web infrastructure.

entry.title: Foundation Document – Version 9.1
entry.summary: Theoretical foundation exploring color as a generative principle in perception and AI-based image systems.

entry.title: Research Notes
entry.summary: Ongoing documentation of experimental observations, analysis, and theoretical development.
